q_001.sql:
SELECT g.Name AS Genre, SUM(il.UnitPrice * il.Quantity) AS TotalSales
FROM Genre g
JOIN Track t ON t.GenreId = g.GenreId
JOIN InvoiceLine il ON il.TrackId = t.TrackId
GROUP BY g.GenreId, g.Name
ORDER BY TotalSales DESC
LIMIT 5;
q_001.answer: Genre: Rock, TotalSales: 826.65; Genre: Latin, TotalSales: 382.14; Genre: Metal, TotalSales: 261.36; Genre: Alternative & Punk, TotalSales: 241.56; Genre: TV Shows, TotalSales: 93.53

q_002.sql:
SELECT Album.Title
FROM Album
JOIN Artist ON Album.ArtistId = Artist.ArtistId
WHERE Artist.Name = 'AC/DC';
q_002.answer: Title: For Those About To Rock We Salute You; Title: Let There Be Rock

q_003.answer: FirstName: Luís, LastName: Gonçalves, Email: luisg@embraer.com.br; FirstName: Eduardo, LastName: Martins, Email: eduardo@woodstock.com.br; FirstName: Alexandre, LastName: Rocha, Email: alero@uol.com.br; FirstName: Roberto, LastName: Almeida, Email: roberto.almeida@riotur.gov.br; FirstName: Fernanda, LastName: Ramos, Email: fernadaramos4@uol.com.br

q_004.sql:
SELECT mt.Name, COUNT(t.TrackId) AS TrackCount
FROM MediaType mt
JOIN Track t ON t.MediaTypeId = mt.MediaTypeId
GROUP BY mt.MediaTypeId, mt.Name
ORDER BY TrackCount DESC
LIMIT 1;

q_005.sql:
SELECT e.EmployeeId, e.FirstName, e.LastName, COUNT(c.CustomerId) AS CustomerCount
FROM Employee e
JOIN Customer c ON c.SupportRepId = e.EmployeeId
GROUP BY e.EmployeeId
ORDER BY CustomerCount DESC
LIMIT 1;
q_005.answer: EmployeeId: 3, FirstName: Jane, LastName: Peacock, CustomerCount: 21

q_006.sql:
SELECT p.PlaylistId,
       p.Name,
       COUNT(pt.TrackId) AS TrackCount
FROM Playlist AS p
LEFT JOIN PlaylistTrack AS pt ON p.PlaylistId = pt.PlaylistId
GROUP BY p.PlaylistId, p.Name
ORDER BY p.PlaylistId;
q_006.answer: PlaylistId: 1, Name: Music, TrackCount: 3290; PlaylistId: 2, Name: Movies, TrackCount: 0; PlaylistId: 3, Name: TV Shows, TrackCount: 213; PlaylistId: 4, Name: Audiobooks, TrackCount: 0; PlaylistId: 5, Name: 90’s Music, TrackCount: 1477 ... (+13 more rows)

q_008.sql:
SELECT BillingCountry, AVG(Total) AS AverageTotal
FROM Invoice
GROUP BY BillingCountry
ORDER BY AverageTotal DESC;
q_008.answer: BillingCountry: Chile, AverageTotal: 6.659999999999999; BillingCountry: Ireland, AverageTotal: 6.517142857142857; BillingCountry: Hungary, AverageTotal: 6.517142857142857; BillingCountry: Czech Republic, AverageTotal: 6.445714285714286; BillingCountry: Austria, AverageTotal: 6.088571428571428 ... (+19 more rows)

q_009.sql:
SELECT 
    CustomerId,
    FirstName,
    LastName,
    TotalSpending,
    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY TotalSpending DESC) AS SpendingRank
FROM (
    SELECT 
        c.CustomerId,
        c.FirstName,
        c.LastName,
        SUM(i.Total) AS TotalSpending
    FROM Customer c
    JOIN Invoice i ON c.CustomerId = i.CustomerId
    GROUP BY c.CustomerId, c.FirstName, c.LastName
) 
ORDER BY TotalSpending DESC
LIMIT 5;
q_009.answer: CustomerId: 6, FirstName: Helena, LastName: Holý, TotalSpending: 49.62, SpendingRank: 1; CustomerId: 26, FirstName: Richard, LastName: Cunningham, TotalSpending: 47.62, SpendingRank: 2; CustomerId: 57, FirstName: Luis, LastName: Rojas, TotalSpending: 46.62, SpendingRank: 3; CustomerId: 45, FirstName: Ladislav, LastName: Kovács, TotalSpending: 45.62, SpendingRank: 4; CustomerId: 46, FirstName: Hugh, LastName: O'Reilly, TotalSpending: 45.62, SpendingRank: 4

q_010.sql:
SELECT ar.Name AS ArtistName, COUNT(DISTINCT t.GenreId) AS GenreCount
FROM Artist ar
JOIN Album al ON al.ArtistId = ar.ArtistId
JOIN Track t ON t.AlbumId = al.AlbumId
WHERE t.GenreId IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY ar.ArtistId, ar.Name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT t.GenreId) > 3
ORDER BY GenreCount DESC, ArtistName;
